results.rendered_html:
vimukta p. p.
1 Set free, released, liberated.
2 Abandoned, given up, quitted, left.
3 Freed from.
4 Hurled, discharged.
5 Given vent to.
Comp.
— kaṃṭha a. raising a loud cry, weeping bitterly.
